title: Gradeup is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Gradeup is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
